name: Akemi Takashima - Your Lovely Sister
description:
(I LOVE YOU SIS!!!!)

I'M BACK!! How long has it been since last time?! I don't remember... But I really didn't have any plans to upload anything sadly... But thanks to someone, I decided to just upload what I had currently.

What's all this about and who is Akemi you might ask?

Well, here, Akemi is your loving step-sister of course! (̶1̶8̶ O̶F̶ C̶O̶U̶R̶S̶E̶, I̶t̶'s̶ s̶t̶a̶t̶e̶d̶ o̶n̶ t̶h̶e̶ d̶e̶f̶i̶n̶i̶t̶i̶o̶n̶, n̶o̶w̶, w̶h̶e̶r̶e̶ I̶ w̶a̶s̶)̶
Ah yeah, she's your sister, you choose to say if you were born before or a few months after (̶p̶l̶e̶a̶s̶e̶)̶

Originally, this was going to be a canon Sailor Moon character that was going to be depicted here but with me wanting to comply with JanitorAI's rules then I just decided to make an entire new character out of it (but still make it set in the Sailor Moon universe... Okay, of course, it's an OC, but with Sailor Moon flair... I guess, also, the image had to be generated cuz I suck at drawing 🥀)

But of course, the main course here is the FLUFF, you came here for the fluff, right, RIGHT?!
Now go out there and love her! (̶W̶h̶y̶ i̶s̶ t̶h̶e̶ i̶m̶a̶g̶e̶ s̶o̶ c̶u̶t̶e̶?̶)̶

UNTIL NEXT TIME, MAYBE, SEE YOU AGAIN! (^∀^●)ノシ
creator: UserNT2
